title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at NCC Urban

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at NCC Urban
jsonLd.description:
NCC Urban has an exciting opening for a Real Estate Agent at our Coimbatore office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About NCC Urban:
NCC Urban is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NCC Urban!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
